message:
refactor(tests): add integration test module declarations

Add module declarations for integration test organization:
- fixture: Test fixtures and helpers
- cli_tests: CLI command integration tests
- db_state_tests: Database state verification tests
- workflow_tests: Multi-step workflow integration tests

This establishes the module structure for the integration test suite,
enabling proper organization as more tests are added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
